entries.title: SSTI detector (polyglot + arithmetic + engine fingerprint)
entries.body:
Finds server-side template injection in three passes. First it sends a **polyglot** `${{<%[%'\"}}%\` (it breaks any engine's syntax and triggers an error/reflection). Then it substitutes **arithmetic with random factors** like `{{7*'7'}}` and `${7*7}`: if the computed product appears in the response instead of the literal payload text, the template is definitely evaluating the input. The third pass uses the differences between engine syntaxes (`{{7*7}}` vs `${7*7}` vs `#{7*7}` vs `{7*7}`) to narrow the engine down to Jinja2/Twig/Freemarker/Velocity/Smarty/Mako/ERB/EJS. The factors are random so a match is not confused with an ordinary number on the page.

> This is only a **detector**: it does not run commands, it only confirms the fact and guesses the engine. Take the RCE payload from the cards below for the specific engine. Mark the injection point with `*` in the URL or pass the POST parameter name via `--where`.

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# ssti_detect.py - ARS3NAL (GPL-3.0). Only for AUTHORIZED testing.
import argparse, random, requests
requests.packages.urllib3.disable_warnings()

POLYGLOT = "${{<%[%'\"}}%\\"

# (name, syntax-template, reverse-priority hint)
PROBES = [
    ("jinja2/twig/smarty(curly)", "{{{{{a}*{b}}}}}"),
    ("freemarker/velocity/spel($)", "${{{a}*{b}}}"),
    ("thymeleaf/jsp-el(#)",        "#{{{a}*{b}}}"),
    ("smarty/mako(single)",        "{{{a}*{b}}}"),
    ("erb/ejs(<%=)",               "<%= {a}*{b} %>"),
]

FINGERPRINT = [
    ("{{7*'7'}}", "7777777", "Jinja2 (Python)"),
    ("{{7*'7'}}", "49",      "Twig (PHP)"),
    ("${7*7}",    "49",      "Freemarker / Velocity / SpEL (Java)"),
    ("#{7*7}",    "49",      "Ruby ERB / Thymeleaf"),
    ("{7*7}",     "49",      "Smarty / Mako"),
]

def send(s, a, payload):
    full = a.url.replace("*", payload) if "*" in a.url else a.url
    ck = dict(c.split("=", 1) for c in a.cookie.split(";") if "=" in c) if a.cookie else None
    try:
        if a.where == "GET":
            r = s.get(full, cookies=ck, verify=False, timeout=20)
        else:
            r = s.post(a.url, data={a.where: payload}, cookies=ck, verify=False, timeout=20)
        return r.text
    except requests.RequestException:
        return ""

def main():
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="ARS3NAL SSTI detector")
    ap.add_argument("-u", "--url", required=True, help="URL with * at the injection point")
    ap.add_argument("--where", default="GET", help="GET or a POST param name")
    ap.add_argument("-c", "--cookie", default="")
    a = ap.parse_args()
    s = requests.Session(); s.headers["User-Agent"] = "ARS3NAL-SSTI/1.0"

    # pass 1: polyglot breaks syntax (error / odd reflection)
    body = send(s, a, POLYGLOT)
    if POLYGLOT not in body:
        print("[~] polyglot mangled (template likely parsed it) - good sign")

    # pass 2: random-factor arithmetic
    hit = False
    for name, tmpl in PROBES:
        x, y = random.randint(40, 99), random.randint(40, 99)
        want = str(x * y)
        payload = tmpl.format(a=x, b=y)
        if want in send(s, a, payload):
            print(f"[+] EVALUATED  {payload!r} -> {want}  (syntax group: {name})")
            hit = True
    if not hit:
        print("[-] no arithmetic evaluated - SSTI not confirmed")
        return

    # pass 3: engine fingerprint
    print("[*] fingerprinting engine ...")
    for payload, marker, engine in FINGERPRINT:
        if marker in send(s, a, payload):
            print(f"    [=] {payload!r} -> {marker!r}  ==> {engine}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

Run:
```bash
python3 ssti_detect.py -u "https://target/page?name=*"
python3 ssti_detect.py -u "https://target/profile" --where bio -c "session=abc"
```
